recommendations.title: The Invisible Guest
recommendations.overview: Barcelona, Spain. Adrián Doria, a young and successful businessman accused of murder, meets one night with Virginia Goodman, an expert interrogation lawyer, in order to devise a defense strategy.

recommendations.title: Mirage
recommendations.overview: During a mysterious thunderstorm, Vera, a young mother, manages to save a life in danger, but her good deed causes a disturbing chain of unexpected consequences.

recommendations.title: God's Crooked Lines
recommendations.overview: Alice Gould, a private investigator, pretends to be mentally ill in order to enter a psychiatric hospital and gather evidence for the case she is working on: the death of a patient in unclear circumstances.

recommendations.title: I See You
recommendations.overview: When a 12-year-old boy goes missing at a local park, a detective investigates the case to help the boy's family find answers.

recommendations.title: The Body
recommendations.overview: Rich entrepreneur Rebecca Zuin has died from an alleged heart attack, raising suspicions on the part of a police inspector after her body disappears from the morgue. When her handsome young husband becomes a suspect, he starts thinking she may have f

recommendations.title: Vertigo
recommendations.overview: A retired San Francisco detective suffering from acrophobia investigates the strange activities of an old friend's wife, all the while becoming dangerously obsessed with her.

recommendations.title: Kahaani
recommendations.overview: Pregnant and alone in the city of Kolkata, a woman begins a relentless search for her missing husband, only to find that nothing is what it seems.

recommendations.title: The Nightshifter
recommendations.overview: Stênio, the nightshifter of a morgue, has the ability to communicate with the cadavers that are brought to him every night.

recommendations.title: Rebecca
recommendations.overview: Story of a young woman who marries a fascinating widower only to find out that she must live in the shadow of his former wife, Rebecca, who died mysteriously several years earlier. The young wife must come to grips with the terrible secret of her han

recommendations.title: Unrest
recommendations.overview: A young pathology med student suspects that the spirit of a dead cadaver in the hospital morgue where she works is killing off all those who handle or desecrate the body.
